raw_findings.content: CI: CI runs a training script

provider_profile.description: Claude model family API. Used for text generation, analysis, code, and agentic tasks.
provider_profile.enterprise_note: Enterprise plan with DPA, SSO, admin controls, no training on data.
provider_profile.free_tier_risk: Personal claude.ai usage may contribute data to training. API usage does not by default.
provider_profile.name: anthropic
provider_profile.training_policy: API: data not used for training by default. Free tier (claude.ai): data may be used. Enterprise: contractual guarantees.

recommendations: Document this AI integration in your organization's AI asset inventory.
Review the integration against your AI governance policy.

risk_reasons.detail: Data is processed by Anthropic (Claude) (Anthropic, PBC). Residency: US. Training policy: API: data not used for training by default. Free tier (claude.ai): data may be used. Enterprise: contractual guarantees.
risk_reasons.title: External AI API: Anthropic (Claude)

insights.summary: Local inference on a large language model.

provider_profile.description: OpenAI models (GPT-4, GPT-4o, embeddings) hosted in Azure tenants with private networking, separate DPA and regional deployment control.
provider_profile.enterprise_note: Private endpoints, VNet integration, Customer-Managed Keys, Azure AD auth, content filtering configurable.
provider_profile.free_tier_risk: No free tier. Access requires an Azure subscription and Microsoft application approval.
provider_profile.name: azure_openai
provider_profile.training_policy: Data is NOT sent to OpenAI and is NOT used to train models. Stays within the customer's Azure tenant.

recommendations: Document this AI integration in your organization's AI asset inventory.
Review the integration against your AI governance policy.

risk_reasons.detail: Data is processed by Azure OpenAI (Microsoft Azure). Residency: customer-selected Azure region (EU, US, UK, …). Training policy: Data is NOT sent to OpenAI and is NOT used to train models. Stays within the customer's Azure tenant.
risk_reasons.title: External AI API: Azure OpenAI

risk_reasons.detail: ChromaDB < 0.4 uses the legacy DuckDB/parquet backend that is no longer tested upstream and will refuse to load in newer client versions. Migrate the collection to >=0.4.
risk_reasons.title: ChromaDB < 0.4 (unsupported schema)

risk_reasons.detail: LangChain versions below 0.1 predate the core/community split and have multiple documented prompt-injection and code-execution issues (CVE-2023-36095, CVE-2023-44467 et al.). Upgrade to the latest 0.2+ series and move integration code to the split packages (``langchain-openai``, …).
risk_reasons.title: LangChain < 0.1 (pre-split, unsupported)

risk_reasons.detail: The 0.x OpenAI Python SDK uses the legacy API surface and is no longer receiving security or compatibility fixes. Upgrade to >=1.0 and migrate any ``openai.Completion`` / ``openai.ChatCompletion`` calls to the new client API.
risk_reasons.title: OpenAI SDK < 1.0 (legacy API)

insights.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation pipeline backed by Azure OpenAI.
